name: Stewed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash the chicken and remove the skin. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
2 Season the chicken with the spices.
3 Place the chicken in a crock pot.
4 Surround the chicken with the cut vegetables: celery, carrots, and zucchini.
5 Add water to barely cover the ingredients.
6 Cook on HIGH until bubbling.
7 Reduce the heat to LOW and cook for 6-8 hours.
8 Serve with rice.
